message.content:
@startuml
title 2 assignData

actor Actor

participant "CatERingAppManager.eventManager:EventManager" as EM
participant "eventManager.currentEvent:Event" as CE
participant "r:EventReceiver" as R

Actor -> EM : assignData(name,date,location,numberOfParticipants,serviceType,tipologyNote)

alt [currentEvent == null]
  EM --> Actor : Throw UseCaseLogicException
else
  EM -> CE : setName(name)
  EM -> CE : setDate(date)
  EM -> CE : setLocation(location)
  EM -> CE : setNumberOfParticipants(numberOfParticipants)
  EM -> CE : setServiceType(serviceType)
  EM -> CE : setTipologyNote(tipologyNote)

  loop for each r in receivers
    EM -> R : notifyDataAssigned(currentEvent)
  end
end
@enduml
